name: Ctrl+C interrupts agent without crash
description: Implement a Ctrl+C / SIGINT handler for the TUI event loop. When Ctrl+C is pressed during agent execution, the TUI must: (1) set agent_running = false, (2) send a cancellation signal to the agent task, (3) transition to Chat mode, (4) leave the workspace in a consistent state. The app must NOT panic or leave the terminal in a broken state. Use tokio::signal::ctrl_c() or a signal handler that fires Msg::Stop.
